Inference Beauty®

paragraphs: Elevate your customers’ experience with product guidance, granular filters made for beauty, and tailored recommendations. Helping your beauty shoppers find the things they need and love, fast and personalized.
Enhance your Beauty E-Commerce with our Plug & Play AI Solutions
Clients love our B2B software for its effortless plug-and-play integration.
Increase in conversion for Skin Care Products
Click-Rate on Product recommendations
Conversion-Rate for Skin Care Finder
Completion Rate of Fragrance Finder

Inference Beauty software solutions are easy to integrate, fully customizable, and come with analytics dashboards that give you valuable insights into how customers interact with your products and what they are really looking for.
+20% increase in all beauty sales

Since implementing Inference Beauty we have seen some impressive results. We have noticed a more engaged community, with customers spending more time exploring our products and interacting with our brand. Most notably, we have experienced an overall 20% increase in sales.

Our solutions work on any platform
Recommend both the perfect routine and products for your customers. Our product finder provides detailed and transparent product information so customers can purchase with confidence.
By offering a full ingredient list with detailed explanations, you offer a transparent service to your customers,instilling trust and confidence that encourages them to purchase from your store.
Granular filters contribute to higher conversion rates, as shoppers are more likely to make a purchase when they can quickly find products that meet their every need.
Of consumers want to know more about the ingredients and products of products.
Of consumers will not buy products because there is no consultation.
of consumers said personalization makes them more likely to purchase
E-Shop Manager, L’Oréal

As a pure D2C Shop we want to give our customers an amazing shopping experience and the opportunity to dive into the world of IT Cosmetics. In that regard, a Foundation Shade Finder is an absolute must for us.
E-Business Performance Manager, L’Oréal

As our product palette is pretty complex, it is quite difficult to come up with a good recommendation system. The algorithm that Inference Beauty uses therefore is an ideal solution for us, as it not only suggests one product, but shows the customer several products that could be right for them by telling them why and why not a product matches their needs. In addition, the solution offers a good user experience.
General Manager IMPORT PARFUMERIE

As the leading Swiss omni-channel provider of prestige perfumes and cosmetics, it is important to us to place emphasis on transparency with regard to the composition of the ingredients in our articles. In order to guarantee professional advice, we are continuously working on being able to offer transparent and easily understandable product information for our range.
E-commerce Manager, CAIA Cosmetics

We wanted to include a skincare finder to increase conversion in a new product range in our assortment. Besides detailed product descriptions and a great educational appearance in social media, this is a great next step in the customer journey since we are selling exclusively on our own website.
Head of Digital Marketing at RAUSCH

As our product palette is pretty complex, it is quite difficult to come up with a good recommendation system. The algorithm that Inference Beauty uses therefore is an ideal solution for us, as it not only suggests one product, but shows the customer several products that could be right for them by telling them why and why not a product matches their needs. In addition, the solution offers a good user experience.

As the pioneer of conscious beauty in the region, it’s our mission to arm our community with the knowledge and information to know exactly what they’re putting in and on their bodies. We are delighted to be able to offer our users with the unconditional transparency offered by Inference Beauty, and to inspire our customers to shop with intent while making better choices for themselves and the world around us.
(formerly known as Skin Match Technology)
At Inference Beauty, we believe that transparency and respect for consumers as individuals are essential for success in the beauty industry.

As a trusted AI and software provider, we deliver affordable tools that prioritizeclear product information,personalized service, andingredient transparency—always in a way that aligns seamlessly with your brand’s values. We gather extensive data on products, ingredients, and consumer preferences, building a robust and ever-evolving network of valuable insights.

Based in Switzerland, we bring the country’s renowned neutrality to the global beauty industry, leading the way in AI-driven solutions forskincare, haircare, body care, foundation, makeup, and fragrance. Our focus remains ontransparency,inclusivity, and delivering unique consultations that help every consumer find the products that are right for them.

Our beauty-industry-focused AI empowers B2B clients withtailored, interactive consumer experiencesacross all touchpoints—online platforms, mobile apps, in-store screens, digital marketing, email campaigns, and social media.

Swiss Made Software Certified, Inference Beauty has evolved over the years into amulti-category powerhouse, delivering personalized product discovery across fragrance, hair care, body care, makeup, and skincare. Alongside our AI-driven recommendation engines, we offer ingredient explainers, fragrance visualizations, and category-specific recommendation tools that elevate the customer journey.
Why “Inference Beauty”?

Our new name marks a bold step into the future of beauty tech. In data science,inferencemeans drawing conclusions based on evidence and reasoning—perfectly capturing our core capability: turning complex data intomeaningful, personalized beauty experiences.
The authority in beauty big data, empowering beauty e-commerce worldwide.
© 2026 Inference Beauty
